ItacAcademyItem.Name: Deformati (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of the Deformati Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Scotti, Giulio Clemente, Monita philosophiae tyronibus opportuna Ferrariensis Deformatorum Academiae magistratus iussu typis vulgata (Ferrariae: Franciscum Succium, 1636). Maylender also mentions Poesie dell`Accademico Eterogeneo Accademico Disformato (Ferrara per Giuseppe Gironi, 1638), which I was unable to find.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
